---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature or improvement for the marketplace
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: ["enhancement", "needs-discussion"]
assignees: ""
---

## Problem Statement

<!-- What problem does this feature solve?
     "I'm always frustrated when..." or "As a [role], I need to..." -->

## Proposed Solution

<!-- A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. -->

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- What other approaches did you consider? Why did you reject them? -->

## User Impact

<!-- Who benefits from this feature?
     - AI model developers
     - Data contributors
     - End consumers
     - DAO token holders
     - Platform operators -->

## Technical Considerations

<!-- Are there any technical constraints, dependencies, or breaking changes?
     Does this affect smart contracts (requires security review)?
     Does this affect the IPFS storage layer?
     Does this require a new Monad contract deployment? -->

## Acceptance Criteria

<!-- How will we know this feature is complete and working correctly?
     - [ ] Criterion 1
     - [ ] Criterion 2 -->

## Priority / Urgency

- [ ] Critical (blocks other work or users)
- [ ] High (important for current sprint)
- [ ] Medium (nice-to-have this quarter)
- [ ] Low (future consideration)

## Additional Context

<!-- Mockups, references to research papers, related issues, etc. -->
